summary: EXP-165 rewrites SEC-6.6 to lead with the dome's own multi-figure inconsistency (four different accuracy figures from the same repository, none matching the 94.5% headline) and reframes the 'manually entered HTML' finding as the consequence of that inconsistency rather than the headline. Closes the 'every journal hardcodes stats' defense by noting that journal figures are traceable to a specific method in the paper body, whereas the dome publishes four methods and matches none.
summary_note: Primary expansion for this issue is EXP-166.json (ready-for-integration, section_6_6_patch schema). EXP-165-sec-6-6.json is a supplementary second-opinion from a later analyst run addressing the same two holes — same analytical conclusions, single-block replacement_html form.
